label: Ritual obligation target filter
description: Defines logic for selecting valid targets for obligation-triggered rituals.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class implementing the obligation target filter logic. Must extend RitualObligationTargetFilter.

colonistThingsOnly.label: Colonist things only
colonistThingsOnly.description: If true, only things owned by the player colony are valid targets.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: List of ThingDefs that are valid obligation targets.

minUnroofedCells.label: Min unroofed cells
minUnroofedCells.description: Minimum number of unroofed cells required near the target for the obligation to trigger.

unroofedCellSearchRadius.label: Unroofed cell search radius
unroofedCellSearchRadius.description: Radius in cells searched around the target when counting unroofed cells.

woodPerParticipant.label: Wood per participant
woodPerParticipant.description: Amount of wood required per participant for this obligation filter.

maxSpeakerDistance.label: Max speaker distance
maxSpeakerDistance.description: Maximum distance from the target at which a speaker role pawn is valid.

maxDrumDistance.label: Max drum distance
maxDrumDistance.description: Maximum distance from the target at which a drum building is counted.

new-obligation-target-filter.label: New ritual obligation target filter
new-obligation-target-filter.description: Minimal obligation target filter with a worker class.
